nodes.label: ProviaAI Hero Banner
nodes.description: Full-bleed hero section for the ProviaAI brand. Deep emerald-green gradient background with subtle radial light rays emanating from center-right. The ProviaAI logo (stylized geometric 'P' with a green leaf/swoosh motif and bold white wordmark) is centered prominently. Visual language: high-contrast, tech-forward, organic-meets-digital. Purpose: top-of-page brand statement / landing hero.
design_decisions: Dominant green (#1a7a1a range) communicates growth, sustainability, and AI-forward identity
Subtle light flares add dynamism without cluttering the composition
Logo positioned centrally with generous negative space — maximizes brand recognition
Dark green background creates strong contrast for white wordmark readability
Leaf motif inside letterform bridges nature/growth metaphor with technology
nodes.layout_pattern: centered logo on gradient hero, no navigation or CTA visible — pure brand splash

edges.rationale: The ProviaAI hero visual is likely used on the ProvKlarUF web product — same repository, shared brand family, complementary green palettes.
